history.text: People's Republic introduced a new form of state rule.
Soviet Socialist Republic introduced a new form of state rule.
Azerbaijan became independent from the Soviet Union, marking a key step in modern statehood.
Constitution adopted and became an important marker in Azerbaijan's constitutional development.

worthSeeing.title: Baku Old City:
worthSeeing.text: Walled inner city UNESCO site with Maiden Tower and medieval palaces.

worthSeeing.title: Mud Volcanoes:
worthSeeing.text: More than half the world's mud volcanoes are found in Azerbaijan.

worthSeeing.title: Flame Towers:
worthSeeing.text: Baku's dramatic skyline of glass towers lit as fire at night.
